title: calceolaria obtusa
intro: Calceolaria obtusa, also known as the strap flower, is a flowering plant species native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calceolaria obtusa include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Calceolaria obtusa is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture form to extract its medicinal compounds.
